prompt: A high-end photorealistic lifestyle shot of a spring garden party table. In the foreground, a beautifully arranged plate of grilled shashlik skewers and fresh spring salads sits on a warm wooden table. A person's hand is holding a modern smartphone, capturing a photo of the food. Over the food on the phone's screen and subtly floating in the air, there are elegant holographic teal and lime green neon UI elements showing nutrition data (calories, proteins, fats). The background is a soft-focus lush green garden with warm sunset light and subtle blue cyberpunk glowing accents. 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, premium aesthetic, vertical composition.
negative_prompt: text, logo, watermark, qr code, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, messy environment, low resolution, cartoon, illustration, cluttered background, red neon, bright pink neon
notes: Used a 'spring garden party' setting to match the 'shashlik and friends' theme of the post.
Incorporated the smartphone as the bridge between the physical food and the digital tracking (FoodFlow's core feature).
Applied the teal/green and blue color palette from the references for the holographic UI to maintain brand consistency.
Focused on 'premium lifestyle' to ensure the cyberpunk elements feel like high-tech tools rather than a gritty sci-fi scene.
